<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests; use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider as BaseServiceProvider; /** * Class TestServiceProvider. */ class TestServiceProvider extends BaseServiceProvider { /** * Indicates if loading of the provider is deferred. * * @var bool */ protected $defer = false; /** * Bootstrap the application events. */ public function boot(): void { $this->loadMigrationsFrom( __DIR__ . '/database/migrations' ); } }
